summary: Send an email to bahoma31@gmail.com informing them that everything is fine and development is ongoing with the new agent

phases.title: Import necessary libraries
phases.description: Import smtplib library to send email

phases.title: Define email parameters
phases.description: Define sender, receiver, subject, and body of the email

phases.title: Establish SMTP connection
phases.description: Use SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, and SMTP_PASS to establish a connection

phases.title: Send email
phases.description: Use smtplib to send the email to bahoma31@gmail.com

success_criteria: Email is delivered to bahoma31@gmail.com with the correct content
